title: Mananthes pseudospicata
taxonomy: Mananthes pseudospicata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is often found in mountainous regions. The plant is an evergreen shrub or small tree that produces white flowers. Mananthes pseudospicata is a member of the genus Mananthes, which is a small group of plants within the Apocynaceae family. Further classification details may be available in botanical resources, but it is generally recognized as a species of Apocynaceae.
